name: Varm Krabbsmorgas (Hot Crabmeat Canapés)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Crabmeat, fresh, frozen or canned, drained & picked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the crabmeat, sherry, salt, pepper, and dill. Set aside.
2. Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in a small, heavy saucepan without browning it. Remove from heat and stir in the flour.
3. In a small bowl, beat the egg yolk with the cream. Stir this mixture into the butter-flour roux using a wire whisk.
4. Return the pan to the heat and cook slowly, whisking constantly for about 1-2 minutes until the mixture thickens. Do not let it boil.
5. Pour the sauce over the crabmeat mixture in the bowl and stir together with a spoon until well combined. Taste for seasoning.
6. Cut four rounds from each slice of bread using a small cookie cutter or glass. Toast the bread rounds on one side only under a moderately hot broiler.
7. Remove the toasted bread rounds and spread the untoasted sides generously with the crabmeat mixture, mounding it slightly. These can be prepared up to this point and refrigerated.
8. Just before serving, place the bread rounds under a hot broiler for about 1 minute or until they brown slightly. Serve very hot.
